narratives.Overview: Implement config loading from crackdown.config.ts (TypeScript-first). The config file exports a MarkyConfig object defining which rules are enabled, their severity, and which plugins to load. Config is resolved relative to the working directory at lint time. Covers FR-4.

items.title: MarkyConfig TypeScript interface exported from packages/core with fields: rules (Record<string, 'error'|'warn'|'off'>), plugins (Plugin[])
loadConfig(cwd: string): Promise<MarkyConfig> resolves crackdown.config.ts via dynamic import, falls back to empty config if file not present
Config lookup walks up the directory tree until crackdown.config.ts is found or root is reached
Example crackdown.config.ts committed to repo root documenting all config options
Unit tests cover: config found and loaded, config absent returns defaults, invalid config shape throws descriptive error
task check passes at >= 85% coverage for config module
